summary: Iteration 101 - Tested supplier branch fixes, advanced analytics, and module tours. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working. Bug fixes for Supplier Report branch column and Ledger branch_name confirmed working.
critical_code_review_comments: Supplier Report Branch Column - VERIFIED: Table shows 'Branch' column with per-branch expense/payment badges (e.g., 'No Branch E:1600 P:10', 'Test Branch E:610 P:0')
Supplier Report Branch Filter - VERIFIED: Clicking branch buttons filters suppliers server-side via branch_id query param
Supplier Ledger Branch Column - VERIFIED: Ledger dialog shows 'Branch' header with entries displaying branch_name ('Test Branch', 'No Branch')
GET /api/reports/supplier-balance - VERIFIED: Returns branch_breakdown dict per supplier with {branch_name: {expenses, paid}}
GET /api/reports/supplier-balance?branch_id={id} - VERIFIED: Filters results by branch
GET /api/suppliers/{id}/ledger - VERIFIED: Returns branch_name and branch_id in each entry
Advanced Analytics Page - VERIFIED: Loads at /advanced-analytics with 5 KPI cards (Revenue, Expenses, Net Profit, Customers, Avg Order)
Advanced Analytics Tabs - VERIFIED: 5 tabs present (Revenue, Cash Flow, Customers, Branches, Expenses)
Revenue Trend Chart - VERIFIED: Area chart displays weekly data
Sales by Payment Mode - VERIFIED: Pie chart shows data distribution (Collection Rate 47%, Total Customers 18%, Conversion Rate 30%, Active Customers 6%)
Module Tours - Suppliers (4 steps): Step 1 'Supplier Management' - VERIFIED
Module Tours - Advanced Analytics (4 steps): Step 1 'Advanced Analytics' - VERIFIED
Module Tours - Data Management (4 steps): Step 1 'Data Management' - VERIFIED
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 101 verified all requested features: 1) Supplier Report page at /supplier-report now shows Branch column with per-branch expense/payment breakdown badges, 2) Branch filter buttons at top of page trigger server-side filtering via branch_id param, 3) Supplier Ledger dialog shows branch_name column in entries table, 4) Advanced Analytics page at /advanced-analytics has 5 KPI cards and 5 tabs (Revenue, Cash Flow, Customers, Branches, Expenses), 5) Revenue Trend area chart and Sales by Payment Mode pie chart work, 6) Expenses tab shows category breakdown pie chart, 7) Three new module tours verified: Suppliers (4 steps starting with 'Supplier Management'), Advanced Analytics (4 steps starting with 'Advanced Analytics'), Data Management (4 steps starting with 'Data Management')

api_supplier_balance_branch_breakdown.branch_breakdown_field: dict with branch names as keys

known_limitations: SMTP email remains blocked by external M365 auth issue (pre-existing from previous iterations)
